title: Operate in isolated and remote situations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate in isolated and remote situations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
